title: Plus One Collection for HSN… Again!
excerpt: Things are busy over here as usual - I updated the Upcoming Events on the side ----> and there's even some more in the works. Thank you so much for all your sweet words about Stitched ! As you may…
body:
Things are busy over here as usual - I updated the Upcoming Events on the side ----> and there's even some more in the works. Thank you so much for all your sweet words about Stitched! As you may remember, I was on HSN for the first time back in March. It turns out another big HSN craft event is happening next week and unfortunately with everything going on here, I cannot make it. Though I am sad to not be in Florida for HSN this time around, I am SO grateful to have the amazing Lisa Bearnson there featuring some Amy Tangerine Plus One products. She's a total pro at what she does and I'm excited to set my DVR to watch her do her magic and unleash some amazing deals - everything is 25% to 40% off! You can purchase them now or while she's featuring them at 4am EST on Tuesday, October 7. 1. Amy Tangerine Embroidery Stencil Kit: This kit is 25% off the HSN price! Check it out here–only $14.95!

2. Plus One Paper Crafting Kit: This kit has it all–48 sheets of paper, 283 accents and phrases, 720 letters and numbers stickers, 168 foam letter stickers, rub-ons, sticker roll and die-cut shapes. Whew! And wait ’til you see the price: $16.95! This is 40% off the already low HSN price!

3. Amy Tangerine Stamp and Marker Set. Wow–this is on sale for $16.95 (40% off the HSN price). There are 22 acrylic stamps, a roller date stamp and rotary phrase stamp, plus five slick writers.

Lisa and I are both giving away an Amy Tangerine Scrapbook kit - winners will be announced Monday, October 6th. The sign up is at the bottom of this post. Good luck!

Here's a handful of gorgeous projects featuring my Plus One collection:

In case you missed any of the previous Plus One project posts, here's Part One, Part Two, Part Three and Part Four!

a Rafflecopter giveaway

Good luck!
